calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Continued To Jul-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to David Lavine (attorney) to appear on July 1, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear and for failure to file final distribution. Status on filing of a final distribution is also continued to that date.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-09-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Continued To Apr-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Continued To Mar-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David S. Levine for and with Graziella Sozzi, Administrator.

Mr. Levine reported that the decedent's children, the sole beneficiaries, are now adults, and all major issues regarding the estate have been resolved except for finalizing the distribution. The transfer of the family home is under review with the assessor's office. Income taxes have been regularly filed, with a final return anticipated by April 15, 2025. The two beneficiaries are prepared to execute waivers and finalize estate matters, and a meeting with all parties is scheduled to take place within four weeks to resolve outstanding issues. Mr. Levine estimated submitting the petition for final distribution between March 15 and April 15, 2025.

The court continued the matter to March 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 for further updates.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Continued To Jan-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Levine for administrator.

Mr. Levine provided an oral report stating that the inventory needs to be amended and corrected because two of the items that were listed are not estate assets, that the items are part of the grandmother's trust, that he needs to contact the probate referee and that there are some re-assessment issues that need to be addressed. Status on close of estate is continued to January 13, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Continued To Aug-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Levine for and with Graziella Sozzi (executor).

Mr. Levine stated that he received a completed inventory and appraisal, and a no tax due letter from Franchise Tax Board, that he needs something like that from the Internal Revenue Service and that he needs more time. Mr. Levine also stated that there is a remaining issue of the extraordinary fees if any, that there is an issue with title of the property having never transferred and that there is the issue of taxes. Status on close of estate is continued to August 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Continued To Apr-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Levine for and with Graziella Sozzi (executor).

Mr. Levine requested a 90-dy continuance stating that all of the work of the estate has been done, but not in the systematic way that it was supposed to, and raised the issue of having a new probate referee appointed. Mrs. Sozzi stated that everything was done at the request of the beneficiaries, that the property was 1031 exchanged for a condo in Lake Tahoe, and that now they want to do it again for a new property in Nevada. The order to appear is off calendar. Status on close of estate is set February 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Bastain. Not reported.
